description:
Mega Man X4 is a 1997 action-platform game developed and published by Capcom. 
Mega Man X4 allows the player to choose between the two mechanoid "Reploids" protagonists at the beginning of the game
X, who uses an arm cannon; or Zero, who wields an energy blade.
Two Maverick Hunters, X and Zero, fight against a Reploid army called the "Repliforce" who are waging war against humanity to earn their independence.

0.0.6.description:
Added requirement options for Double/Iris, General and Sigma (like the ones for the Mavericks)
Added switching between unlocked buster types by holding down the Select button

Logic now correctly requires Rising Fire to beat Sigma
Armor upgrades are now correctly classified as filler when playing as Zero
0.0.6.title: v0.0.6 - Buster Switching!

0.0.7.description:
Changes by OnlyLeafeon on Discord

- Deathlink added
- Energylink added (with yaml options)
- Damagelink added
  - Losing 1 HP: 10 points
  - Deaths will send all the HP lost as damage points
- Dedicated Mega Man X4 client that has a popup to show your inventory

(no changes to the patch)
0.0.7.title: v0.0.7 - Energy Link and Dedicated Client

0.1.0.description:
- Vastly reduced amount of setup required with ap patch support (thanks to lx5 for providing the base for this!)
  - Added xdelta3 as required software
- Deathlink fixes (OnlyLeafeon)
- Energylink no longer spams the client (OnlyLeafeon)
- Added option for Infinite Nova Strike (OnlyLeafeon)
- Improved performance

Known Issues:
- Energylink may cause stutters when getting hit/healing
- Visiting the title screen will send a Deathlink, so try to enter the intro stage before connecting
0.1.0.title: v0.1.0 - Easy Setup

0.1.1.description:
- Fixed an issue that caused errors for other PS1 APs (fix by @TheRealSolidusSnake )
- Improved Energy Link performance
0.1.1.title: v0.1.1 - Energy Link Performance Fix

0.1.2.description:
- Added Character and Pickupsanity to slot data for Poptracker integration (@TheRealSolidusSnake)
- Deathlink should no longer be triggering when visiting the title screen (@OnlyLeafeon)
0.1.2.title: v0.1.2 - Poptracker compatibility

0.1.3.description:
- Reverted previous Deathlink change that led to worse issues
- Zero no longer receives multiples of each armor piece
0.1.3.title: v0.1.3 - Hot Fix

v1.0.0.description:
A version with many known issues but playable ;)

Archipelago Steps

1. Download the YAML and change the name inside of it and the file name
2. Put the APWorld in your custom worlds
3. Generate with the YAML in the players folder and host

Client Steps

1. Put the APWorld in your custom worlds for the [Archipelago Launcher](https://archipelago.gg/tutorial/Archipelago/setup_en)
2. Through the launcher run the Bizhawk Client tool
3. Download and install Bizhawk
4. Legally Obtain PSX Firmware for Bizhawk
5. Legally Obtain a USA Version of the MMX4 ROM
6. Apply the XDelta patch here to the ROM, can use [this tool](https://kotcrab.github.io/xdelta-wasm/)
7. Run your Patched ROM in Bizhawk
8. From your Archipelago Launcher folder go to Data/Lua and put connector_bizhawk_generic.lua in your Bizhawk Tools/Lua Console Scripts
9. Connect to your created room through the Bizhawk Client Tool in the Archipelago Launcher
v1.0.0.title: Archipelago MMX4 v1.0.0
